nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I'm the assistant bonded to your helmet. You won't last long out here without the basics - clean water and food. Let's fix that first.

responses.buttonText: How do I get clean water?

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Sure - sending tips to your helmet HUD. Grab a bottle, fill it at the bank, and drink.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: On it - tips are on your HUD. Catch a fish, cook it at a fire, then eat.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I see you've already secured food and water. Good. That makes this easier.
